_comment: Editorial cut list. Copy to <episode-dir>/clips.json and fill in. Times are 'H:MM:SS' or 'MM:SS' (fractions ok: '0:21:28.5'), read from work/transcript_turns.txt. speaker: a diarized id like 'speaker_0', or 'any' to keep both speakers' words (banter). shot: 'solo' (full-frame on that speaker) or 'stacked' (both cams). Segments play in listed order — reordering dialogue is allowed and encouraged when it tightens the story.
